response: TEMPERATURE IS A MEASURE OF THE HEAT ENERGY IN A SUBSTANCE. IT IS A SCALING THAT HELP TO UNDERSTAND HOW MUCH HEAT IS PRESENT IN A SYSTEM. THE TEMPERATURE OF A BODIES VARY WITH TIME AND ENVIRONMENT. IT IS A KEY FACTOR IN MANY PHYSICAL AND CHEMICAL PROCESSES. THE TEMPERATURE OF A ROOM IS A COMMONLY MEASURED VALUE.
